backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the wedding invitation platform, handling invite CRUD, user profiles, RSVP responses, and access control with blob storage and invite links mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that StepPublish.tsx implements a fully reactive actor readiness guard with null-checks, a disabled publish button, and a 'Connecting to backend…' spinner when the actor is not ready.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each component's purpose and recent changes, used as build planning reference documentation.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Hindu Wedding Invitation Website Builder app, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for landing, create, invite display, and RSVP responses pages, wrapped in QueryClient and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepCoup: Form step component for entering bride/groom names, wedding date, tagline, and a read-only default RSVP thank-you message with validation error display.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepEven: Form step component for managing a dynamic list of wedding ceremony events, each with name, time, venue, and address/map URL fields, with add/remove controls.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepGall: A form step component for uploading and reordering gallery images (with drag-and-drop) and uploading a background music file, with upload progress tracking via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepPhot: A form step component with individual PhotoUploader sub-components for uploading bride, groom, and cover photos, showing local previews and upload progress.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepPubl: A publish step that uploads all invitation assets (photos, gallery, music) sequentially with per-step progress tracking, then saves the invitation via the backend actor and displays a share section on success.
frontend/src/components/creator/StepTemp: A template selection step that displays a grid of available invitation templates with light/dark variant toggle, highlighting the selected template with a checkmark.
frontend/src/components/effects/Drifting: A canvas-based animation component that renders drifting, rotating petal ellipses falling across the screen, respecting the user's reduced-motion preference.
frontend/src/components/effects/Floating: A decorative photo frame component with a multi-layered gold border, glow effects, and an optional floating animation, respecting reduced-motion preferences.
frontend/src/components/effects/Glassmor: A simple wrapper card component applying glassmorphism styling (backdrop blur, semi-transparent background, border) with optional dark mode.
frontend/src/components/effects/MouseTil: A wrapper component that applies a 3D perspective tilt transform based on mouse position, with smooth enter/leave transitions and reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/effects/Parallax: A wrapper component that translates its children vertically based on scroll position to create a parallax effect, disabled when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Backg: A fixed-position music player button that attempts autoplay on mount and falls back to a first-interaction listener if blocked, with play/pause toggle and a tooltip prompt when autoplay is blocked.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Count: Displays a live countdown to a wedding date using four styled flip-unit boxes (days, hours, minutes, seconds), updating every second and showing a celebration message when the date has passed.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Event: Renders a vertical alternating timeline of wedding schedule events, each in a glassmorphism card with scroll-triggered fade-in animations, showing time, venue, and optional map links.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Invit: Injects Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags into the document head based on the invite record, using the couple's names, wedding date, and cover photo URL, and restores the default title on unmount.
frontend/src/components/invitation/RSVPF: A form component that collects guest name, email, attendance, guest count, and message, submits the RSVP via a mutation hook, and displays a thank-you message on success.
frontend/src/components/invitation/Share: Provides share controls for an invitation including copy-link, WhatsApp share, QR code display, and a creator-only button to navigate to RSVP responses.
frontend/src/components/landing/SampleIn: A clickable card that displays a sample invitation's template thumbnail, couple names, and wedding date, navigating to the invite preview on click with a hover overlay.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header that includes a logo, login/logout controls using Internet Identity, and renders child content below.
frontend/src/components/templates/BaseTe: Provides the shared structural template for wedding invitations, composing hero, gallery, countdown, events timeline, RSVP form, music, and effects sections with deferred rendering for off-screen content.
frontend/src/components/templates/DarkCo: A dark-themed wedding invitation template with cosmic/space aesthetics, featuring constellation SVG overlays, orbital ring motifs, and deep navy/gold color schemes passed into BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/Floral: A warm floral wedding invitation template with marigold garland SVG borders, bloom motifs, and amber/orange/yellow color schemes rendered via BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/LotusB: A lotus-themed wedding invitation template featuring layered lotus flower SVGs, water ripple effects, and pink/gold color palettes in both light and dark variants via BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/Minima: A wedding invitation template with a minimal Sanskrit aesthetic, featuring an Om watermark, Devanagari-inspired floral borders, and lotus motifs rendered as SVG overlays in light or dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/Mughal: A wedding invitation template styled after Mughal garden architecture, featuring a jali lattice background pattern, a pointed horseshoe arch frame, and gold/emerald color schemes in light or dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/RoyalN: A wedding invitation template with a royal navy and gold zari embroidery aesthetic, featuring decorative zari borders with repeating circle motifs and a regal crest SVG overlay in light or dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/RoyalR: A wedding invitation template inspired by Royal Rajasthani design, featuring jali lattice corner overlays, paisley clusters, and a crimson-and-gold color palette in light or dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/SouthI: A wedding invitation template inspired by South Indian bronze and kolam art, featuring a dot-grid kolam background pattern, corner knot motifs, and a bronze/copper/gold color palette in light or dark variants.
frontend/src/components/templates/Sunset: A wedding invitation template with a warm sunset beach aesthetic, featuring coral/amber/teal color schemes, SVG sun-burst halos, wave-crest borders, and palm silhouettes rendered via BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/Temple: A wedding invitation template with an Indian temple mandala aesthetic, featuring orange/gold color schemes and SVG mandala patterns with concentric rings, petal spokes, and corner decorations rendered via BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/ThreeD: A wedding invitation template with a mystical 3D floating divine aesthetic using deep purple/gold colors, featuring layered SVG lotus mandalas with multi-ring petal structures and radial glows rendered via BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/components/templates/VedicF: A wedding invitation template with a Vedic fire (Agni) aesthetic using amber/red/gold colors, featuring SVG flame tongues at the bottom and Sri Yantra geometric patterns rendered via BaseTemplate.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A React context provider and hook that manages Internet Identity authentication state, exposing login/logout functions, identity, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating invite/RSVP data via the backend actor, including get, create, update, and RSVP submission operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts: Hook that reads and persists a reduced-motion preference from localStorage and the OS media query, toggling a CSS class on the document root accordingly.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with a Hindu wedding OKLCH color palette, and defines utility classes for fonts, glass effects, and themed text colors.
frontend/src/lib/templateRegistry.ts: Defines metadata for all available invitation templates (free and premium) and exports a typed registry mapping template IDs to lazy-loaded component loaders.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, random ID generation, date/datetime formatting, and converting a File to a Base64 data URL.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitePage.tsx: Multi-step invite creation/editing page that manages form state across template selection, couple details, photos, events, gallery, and publish steps, pre-populating from an existing invite when an editId is provided.
frontend/src/pages/InvitePage.tsx: Public invite view page that fetches an invite by ID and lazily renders the appropriate template component, with loading skeleton and not-found error states.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page that shows a marketing/hero view for unauthenticated users and transforms into a personal 'My Invitations' dashboard with invite cards for authenticated users. Handles login via Internet Identity and navigation to the create flow.
frontend/src/pages/RSVPResponsesPage.tsx: Page that displays RSVP responses for a specific invitation, accessible only to the authenticated creator. Shows auth-required, loading, access-denied, and response-table states with summary statistics.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a Hindu wedding custom color palette (gold, saffron, marigold, etc.), custom serif/sans font families, CSS variable-based semantic colors, and animation/typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document (version 27) describing the Hindu Wedding Invitation Builder app's features, architecture, known issues (e.g., IC 2MB payload limit, actor initialization errors), and fix requests for the current development session.
